title: onobrychis arenaria subsp. taurerica
intro: Onobrychis arenaria subsp. taurerica, also known as Tauric yellow melilot, is a subspecies of the yellow melilot plant, which is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of Turkey. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tauric yellow melilot include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts have also been used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
